content:
{
  "mode": "method",
  "tests": [
    {
      "name": "count_pieces_basic",
      "input": [[{"id": 1}, {"id": 2}, {"id": 3}, {"id": 4}]],
      "output": 4,
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Validates counting of a basic set of 4 distinct pieces."
    },
    {
      "name": "count_pieces_with_duplicates",
      "input": [[{"id": 1}, {"id": 1}, {"id": 2}, {"id": 3}]],
      "output": 3,
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Tests counting with duplicate pieces, ensuring unique count."
    },
    {
      "name": "count_pieces_empty",
      "input": [[]],
      "output": 0,
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Edge case for an empty input, should return 0."
    },
    {
      "name": "count_pieces_large_set",
      "input": [[{"id": i} for i in range(1000)]],
      "output": 1000,
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Tests counting a large set of 1000 pieces."
    },
    {
      "name": "find_piece_valid",
      "input": [{"pieces": [{"id": 1}, {"id": 2}, {"id": 3}], "target": 2}],
      "output": {"id": 2},
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Validates finding a specific piece that exists."
    },
    {
      "name": "find_piece_not_found",
      "input": [{"pieces": [{"id": 1}, {"id": 2}, {"id": 3}], "target": 4}],
      "output": null,
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Tests finding a piece that does not exist, should return null."
    },
    {
      "name": "find_piece_empty_list",
      "input": [{"pieces": [], "target": 1}],
      "output": null,
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Edge case for an empty list of pieces, should return null."
    },
    {
      "name": "find_piece_multiple_matches",
      "input": [{"pieces": [{"id": 1}, {"id": 1}, {"id": 2}], "target": 1}],
      "output": {"id": 1},
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Tests finding a piece with multiple occurrences, should return one."
    }
  ],
  "assumptions": "The input format for pieces and targets is consistent and follows the specified structure.",
  "notes": "Ensure the methods handle both counting and finding pieces efficiently."
}
